scripts.dev: concurrently -k "node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs server dev" "node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs client dev" "node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs docs dev"
scripts.build: node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs server build && node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs client build
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs server start
scripts.test: node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs server test && node scripts/run-workspace-script.mjs client test
